<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body { background: #000; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; min-height: 100vh; }
  .banner {
    position: relative;
    width: 900px;
    height: 320px;
    background: #000;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;
  }
  .img-left {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0; top: 0;
    width: 320px; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center center;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,1) 55%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,1) 55%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
  }
  .img-right {
    position: absolute;
    right: 0; top: 0;
    width: 320px; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center 20%;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, rgba(0,0,0,1) 55%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, rgba(0,0,0,1) 55%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
  }
  .center-bg {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%; top: 0;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 400px; height: 100%;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.9) 35%, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
    z-index: 5;
  }
  .center-text {
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%; top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    text-align: center;
    color: #fff;
    z-index: 10;
    width: 340px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .word { font-size: 50px; letter-spacing: 8px; color: #fff; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; }
  .pos { font-size: 15px; color: #888; font-style: italic; letter-spacing: 2px; margin: 6px 0 12px; }
  .divider { width: 140px; height: 0.5px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); margin: 0 auto 12px; }
  .def { font-size: 11.5px; color: #bbb; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.2px; white-space: normal; width: 300px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .dots { font-size: 10px; color: #444; letter-spacing: 6px; margin-top: 12px; }
  .corner { position: absolute; width: 22px; height: 22px; z-index: 20; }
  .tl { top: 14px; left: 14px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
  .tr { top: 14px; right: 14px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
  .bl { bottom: 14px; left: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
  .br { bottom: 14px; right: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="banner">
  <img class="img-left" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="samurai hands with sword"/>
  <img class="img-right" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="reaching hands"/>
  <div class="center-bg"></div>
  <div class="center-text">
    <div class="word">sonder</div>
    <div class="pos">n.</div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="def">
      the realisation that each random passerby<br>
      is living a life as vivid and complex<br>
      as your own — populated with their own<br>
      ambitions, friends, routines, worries<br>
      and inherited craziness
    </div>
    <div class="dots">· · ·</div>
  </div>
  <div class="corner tl"></div>
  <div class="corner tr"></div>
  <div class="corner bl"></div>
  <div class="corner br"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

<!--
**SomethingAboutLuv7/SomethingAboutLuv7** is a ✨ _special_ ✨ repository because its `README.md` (this file) appears on your GitHub profile.

Here are some ideas to get you started:

- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...
- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...
- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...
- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...
- 💬 Ask me about ...
- 📫 How to reach me: ...
- 😄 Pronouns: ...
- ⚡ Fun fact: ...
-->
